architecture.summary: New action-items-engine module in eval/ layer, LLM call after verdict, structured output parsed into ActionItem interface. ActionItemsPanel React component below verdict card. Reuses existing /improve endpoint via notes param for Apply AI Fix. All within vskill repo.

integrations.summary: Reuses existing LLM client (createLlmClient), existing /improve endpoint, existing SSE streaming infrastructure. No new external integrations.

security.summary: N/A - no new auth, no new API surface beyond extending existing compare endpoint, no PII. Internal developer tool.

ui-ux.summary: ActionItemsPanel always expanded below verdict card. Color vocabulary matches VERDICT_STYLES (green/yellow/orange/red). Apply AI Fix navigates to workspace editor with existing SkillImprovePanel UX — shows diff before applying.

performance.summary: Action items LLM call runs automatically as part of compare SSE stream after verdict. One call total (~10-15s) is negligible vs the multi-case comparison. Runs for all verdicts including EFFECTIVE (provides positive reinforcement and strengths list).

edge-cases.summary: Action items generation is wrapped in try/catch — non-fatal, comparison still valid without it. Partial comparison failures: action items analyze only successful cases (same as verdict computation). SKILL.md truncated to 2000 chars to avoid token bloat. JSON parsing has fallback defaults if LLM returns invalid JSON.
